# ANALYSIS: MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE gym validators

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We need to validate that the MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE implementation (with variants A and B) correctly suppresses the 1-trig trendline→premium-stop losers identified in the midday autopsy while preserving J anchor wins.

## Mechanism

The gym validator will test three configurations: (1) no gate (baseline), (2) variant A (specific gate parameters), (3) variant B (alternate gate parameters) against the 32 midday loser cases from the autopsy. For each config we will record: number of losers suppressed (i.e., no entry triggered), number of losers where entry still occurs (and resulting P&L), and verify that J anchor days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) still produce entries with expected P&L.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline  
2. **Sample bias:** The midday autopsy sample consists of 32 loser cases identified from post-mortem analysis; selection method is deterministic (all midday losers). Overfit risk: gate may be tuned to this specific sample.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window not yet performed)  
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real-fills check on top 3 J days not yet performed for variants)  
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: if gate is too restrictive, could block valid entries on anchor days; max drawdown scenario: gate fails to suppress losers leading to large losses; blow-up scenario: gate causes excessive whipsaw in choppy markets.  
6. **Concentration:** If top-5 days = X% of P&L, state X (unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest)  

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators must pass (all 32 midday losers suppressed for the 1-trig trendline→premium-stop pattern, anchor wins preserved), followed by walk-forward OOS validation and real-fills check on the top 3 J days.

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- awaiting gym validator results  

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis evaluates the MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE candidate currently ranked #21 on the leaderboard; results will inform its ratification readiness. No conflict with existing candidates; complements the V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE (rank 17) by covering an adjacent time window.
